step_rationale: Cytoprotective metabolite reducing ischemia-reperfusion injury and oxidative stress.
mechanism: Hypotaurine provides antioxidant and cytoprotective functions during myocardial ischemia-reperfusion, attenuating cardiomyocyte injury.

references.title: Modified Taohong Siwu decoction improves cardiac function after myocardial ischaemia and reperfusion in rats by promoting endogenous stem cell mobilization and regulating metabolites.
